description: Literature references for physics assumptions. Every unvalidated parameter must reference at least one ref_id.

references.title: Kinetic study of sewage sludge pyrolysis using distributed activation energy model
references.notes: DAEM-based analysis showing Ea range 200-400 kJ/mol, A range 1e15-1e20 s^-1 for sewage sludge

references.title: The devolatilization of sewage sludge and coal particles
references.notes: Multiple parallel first-order reactions with Ea spanning 110-310 kJ/mol. Supports Tier-2 parallel reaction structure.

references.title: Modeling chemical and physical processes of wood and biomass pyrolysis
references.journal: Progress in Energy and Combustion Science
references.notes: Comprehensive review of wood pyrolysis kinetics. Global first-order: Ea 140-210 kJ/mol, A 1e9-1e14 s^-1

references.title: Sewage sludge pyrolysis in fluidized bed: Product distribution and compositional analysis
references.notes: Proximate/ultimate analysis of sewage sludge. Ash 30-50%, VM 50-65%, FC 5-15% (dry basis)

references.title: Pyrolysis and gasification characterization of sewage sludge for resource recovery
references.notes: Heat transfer coefficients for rotary kiln and auger reactors. U ranges 20-80 W/m2K depending on fill and rotation.

references.title: On the pyrolysis of sewage sludge: the influence of pyrolysis conditions on solid, liquid and gas fractions
references.journal: Journal of Analytical and Applied Pyrolysis
references.notes: Pyrolysis reaction enthalpy data. Endothermic range 0.3-1.0 MJ/kg dry solids depending on temperature.

references.title: Kinetics of sludge devolatilization via DTA analysis
references.notes: Parallel first-order reactions with wide Ea spread. Supports conservative mid-range Ea selection.

references.title: DAEM kinetics of municipal sludge: Effects of heating rate and atmosphere
references.notes: DAEM analysis showing Ea up to 400 kJ/mol at high conversion. Confirms wide Ea distribution.

references.title: Residence time distributions in a screw conveyor reactor
references.notes: Auger reactor heat transfer: U = 200-400 W/m²·K. RTD close to plug flow.

references.title: A thermal model for the rotary kiln including heat transfer within the bed
references.notes: Rotary kiln indirect heating: U = 30-50 W/m²·K. Longer residence times (30-180 min).

references.title: Study of the pyrolysis liquids obtained from different sewage sludge
references.journal: Journal of Analytical and Applied Pyrolysis
references.notes: Sludge slow pyrolysis ~500°C: char 0.35-0.55 kg/kg TDS, gas energy 2.5-4.5 MJ/kg TDS.

references.title: Energy and nutrient recovery from sewage sludge via pyrolysis
references.notes: Conversion ≥90-95% required for pathogen destruction, odor elimination, char stability.

notes: This registry must be updated whenever new literature sources are used. CI should fail if validated=False and source_refs=[].
